pageContext.name: Batman and Batmobile Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Batman and Batmobile Deluxe! Based on original references from Batman: The Animated Series, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   DC Comics fans, don't miss your chance to add Batman and Batmobile Deluxe to your DC Comics collection!
